action.reasoning: Observation: predict.py failed with exit 1 during evaluation. Analysis: Batching the original and flipped images together in predict.py caused an Out-Of-Memory (OOM) error on the GPU, as SegFormer-B5 is very large and high-resolution images take up a lot of VRAM. Decision: Revert predict.py to process the original and flipped images sequentially to avoid OOM. Submit the final trained checkpoint (epoch_119.pt) for evaluation.
